title: Fit test - 2nd screen "Cancel" during test
scenario: Fit Test Cancel button on second screen shows Cancel/Retry buttons instead of returning to previous screen
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap on Fit Test to start the fit test
On the second screen of the fit test, tap the 'Cancel' button
expected: The fit test is interrupted and returns to the previous screen or fit test setup.
